# Inline

Reversed link syntax (text)[https://example.com] (MD011).

Bare URL https://example.com used directly (MD034).

Emphasis with ** spaces inside ** markers (MD037).

Code span with ` spaces ` inside (MD038).

Link with [ spaces ](https://example.com) in text (MD039).

An empty [link]() with no destination (MD042).

![](image.png) image without alt text (MD045).

Mixed *asterisk* and _underscore_ emphasis (MD049).

Mixed **asterisk** and __underscore__ strong (MD050).
